calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Karen Y. Uchiyama, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Alex Martinez, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jose Martinez.
Default was entered against defendant on January 8, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 22, 2010.
Plaintiff's Brief was filed today, February 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Alex Martinez, and against the Defaulted Defendant Alex Martinez as follows:

As of August 10, 2006, plaintiff Alex Martnez was and is the sole owner of the title in fee simple of the real property located at 282 Orizaba Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94132. Furthermore, the document entitled notice of correction of ownership, dated March 2, 2007, is hereby expunged. Defendant Jose Martinez is hereby enjoined to make any further claim to the subject property.

Additionally, plaintiff Alex Martinez is awarded costs payable by defendant Jose Martinez in the amount of $370.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
